landing.step1Desc: Add the server and API token; it's stored encrypted on the server.
landing.step2Desc: Pull your forms and decide who can view, edit or validate each one.
landing.step3Desc: They view, edit and approve/reject, with their own review flow.
landing.tagline: Manage your KoboToolbox data and give your team access
landing.subtitle: KoboManager is the middle layer that lets your team view, edit and validate submissions — without a Kobo account and without exposing your API token.
landing.feat1Desc: Your team signs in with app users; they don't need a KoboToolbox account.
landing.feat2Desc: Approve or reject submissions with your own validation flow, decoupled from Kobo.
landing.feat3Desc: The Kobo token is stored encrypted on the server and never exposed to the browser.
landing.footer: KoboManager — a management layer for KoboToolbox
landing.feat4Desc: Decide which submissions each user sees —by a field value or by who submitted them—, not just which forms.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgot.sent: If that email has an account, we've sent a link to reset the password. Check your inbox (and the spam folder). The link expires in 1 hour.

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.tooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.invalid: This recovery link is invalid or has expired.
reset.done: Password changed. Your sessions were closed; taking you to sign in…

dashboard.settingsDesc: General settings, such as which forms to sync.
dashboard.aboutDesc: What KoboToolbox is, how to create an account and where to get your API token.
dashboard.guideDesc: How the app works: roles, workflow and FAQ.

guide.title: User guide
guide.subtitle: How KoboManager works, step by step.
guide.roleAdminBody: Connects KoboToolbox accounts, syncs forms, creates users and assigns permissions. Full access.
guide.roleViewerBody: Accesses only the forms the administrator assigns; views, edits or validates submissions per their permissions. No KoboToolbox account needed.
guide.step1Body: Under “Kobo accounts”, the administrator adds the server and API token (stored encrypted).
guide.step2Body: From “Forms”, pull the account's forms. A setting decides which statuses are synced (deployed, drafts, archived).
guide.step3Body: Under “Permissions”, decide which users can view, edit or validate each form.
guide.step4Body: Each user opens “My forms”, browses submissions and approves or rejects them with their own review flow.
guide.syncIntro: Both fetch submissions from Kobo into the local cache, but with different scope:
guide.syncUpdateBody: Fetches only new submissions and removes from the cache those deleted in Kobo. Fast; the everyday option.
guide.syncResyncBody: Re-downloads all submissions. Also reflects edits made directly in Kobo. Slower; use it if you edited submissions in Kobo or suspect the cache is stale.
guide.pwChangeBody: Any user can change their password from “My profile” (providing the current one).
guide.pwForgotBody: If the administrator enables email recovery, a “Forgot your password?” link appears at sign-in: a temporary link is sent to set a new one.
guide.dataLabelsBody: Questions and options are shown with the form's readable text, not the raw codes.
guide.dataAttachmentsBody: Each submission's photos, audio, video and files are shown in its detail.
guide.dataMapBody: Submissions with a location (point, line or polygon) are shown on a map.
guide.dataScopeBody: Admins can limit, per user and form, which submissions are visible (e.g. by a region or the enumerator who sent them); the rest stays hidden when editing or validating too.
guide.formActionsIntro: From “My forms”, each form offers a few quick actions:
guide.faEnketoBody: Opens the public form (Enketo) to fill in a new submission; deployed forms only.
guide.faUpdateBody: Pulls new submissions from Kobo (incremental sync).
guide.faResyncBody: Re-downloads all submissions; also reflects edits made in Kobo.
guide.faLoginBody: Opens the form directly in KoboToolbox (requires a Kobo account).
guide.formActionsNote: For viewers, the admin enables each action in “Settings”; admins always have them.
guide.exploreSearchBody: Search text across submissions and filter by review status; sort by date and choose how many to show per page.
guide.exploreColumnsBody: Choose which columns are shown and reorder them by dragging; the preference is remembered per form.
guide.exploreCalculatedBody: In the same picker, the “Calculated” group adds columns the app derives from the submission (duration, has attachments, has geo). The detail view shows a “Summary” block with every metric (completeness, upload delay, time/day, version, Kobo validation…); the CSV export includes the three calculated columns.
guide.exploreStatsBody: Form summary: total and freshness, submissions per day, review status, distribution by question (single‑choice) and by enumerator, fill‑in duration (mean/median + histogram), activity by hour/day, attachments and geographic coverage.
guide.reviewSingleBody: On a submission's detail, approve or reject it with a comment; the status is internal to KoboManager.
guide.reviewBatchBody: Select several submissions with the checkboxes (or all on the page) and approve/reject them at once with a shared comment. Requires validate permission.
guide.reviewExportBody: Download the submissions —with the active filters— as a CSV (UTF-8, opens fine in Excel) with each question's readable labels.
guide.shareIntro: The admin can create links so anyone can browse a form's submissions with no Kobo or KoboManager account —handy because KoboToolbox is retiring its “share without login”.
guide.shareExposesBody: Each link decides whether to expose the submission list, the detail, the map and/or the attachments (the latter only on password-protected links, and if the server's global policy allows it); it never shows the internal review status.
guide.shareAccessBody: Entry is via a link with an unguessable token; it can optionally be password-protected, and can carry a row filter to show only a subset.
guide.shareLifecycleBody: A link can have an expiry date and can always be revoked instantly from “Sharing”.
guide.notifBody: Each user can enable, under “Notifications”, a daily email summary of new submissions for the chosen forms (requires the admin to have configured email sending).
guide.auditBody: Under “Audit log”, the admin browses the record of actions (who did what and when) with filters by action, user, form and date, plus a panel with the last run of the scheduled tasks and the sync status.
guide.auditSelfBody: If the admin enables “Self-service activity log” in Settings, every user gets a “My activity” menu entry where they review only their own action log (never anyone else's), with filters by action, form and date.
guide.secTokenBody: The Kobo API token is stored encrypted on the server and is never shown or sent to the browser.
guide.secSessionsBody: Access uses a secure cookie session that renews with use (up to a cap); from your profile you can close your other sessions if you don't recognize them, and the admin can remotely close all of a user's sessions.
guide.secScopeBody: Each user sees only the forms —and, with row access, only the submissions— the admin assigns them.

profile.title: My profile
profile.languageDesc: Choose the interface language for your account.
profile.pwTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.sessionsDesc: Devices where your account is currently signed in. You can close the others if you don't recognize them.
profile.sessConfirm: All your active sessions except this device will be closed. You'll need to sign in again on the rest.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Email alerts about your forms' activity.
notifications.dailySummaryDesc: Get a morning email with the new submissions of the selected forms.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Application users (not KoboToolbox users).
users.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters if you change it.
users.cantDeactivateSelf: You can't deactivate your own account
users.confirmActivate: Are you sure you want to activate “{name}”?
users.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate “{name}”? They won't be able to sign in and their active sessions will be closed.
users.revokeSessionsTitle: Close all of this user's active sessions (they'll have to sign in again)
users.confirmRevoke: All active sessions for “{name}” will be closed. They'll have to sign in again.

accounts.title: Kobo accounts
accounts.subtitle: Administrator credentials for each KoboToolbox server. The token is stored encrypted and never shown.
accounts.label: Label
accounts.tokenHelp: Where do I get the API token?
accounts.tokenKeepHint: Only type it if you want to replace the current token.
accounts.cantDeleteTooltip: Can't delete: it has {n} synced form(s)
accounts.confirmDelete: Account “{label}” will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

forms.title: Forms
forms.subtitle: Sync forms from your KoboToolbox accounts.
forms.viewTitle: Open the public form (Enketo), no Kobo account needed
forms.loginTitle: Open the form in KoboToolbox (requires signing in to Kobo)
forms.enketoErr: could not get the public link
forms.updateTitle: Fetch new submissions and remove those deleted in Kobo
forms.resyncTitle: Re-download all submissions: also reflects edits made in Kobo
forms.confirmResync: All submissions of “{name}” will be re-downloaded from Kobo (reflects edits and deletions). May take a while for large forms.
forms.deleteTitle: Remove this form and its cache from KoboManager
forms.inactiveTitle: Out of the status filter; hidden from users. It is reactivated if it matches the filter on sync.
forms.confirmDelete: “{name}” and its submission cache will be removed from KoboManager. Nothing is deleted in KoboToolbox; if it still matches the filter, it will come back on sync.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Assign which forms each user can view, edit or validate.
permissions.scopeIntro: The user will only see submissions matching ALL conditions (each condition allows several values).
permissions.scopeNoConditions: No filter: the user sees every submission of the form.
permissions.scopeLoadError: Could not load the form fields

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: General settings, applied to all Kobo accounts.
settings.syncTypesDesc: When syncing an account, only forms in the checked states will be fetched.
settings.syncDefault: Default: only “Deployed”. The change applies on the next sync.
settings.languageDesc: Interface language for users who haven't chosen their own.
settings.labelsDesc: How questions and options are shown in submissions.
settings.labelMode_labelsHint: Show the form's text (e.g. “Satisfaction”, “Very high”). Fetched on sync.
settings.labelMode_rawHint: Show internal names and raw codes (e.g. “satisfaccion”, “1”).
settings.fieldTruncateDesc: Trims long field names in the interface (table headers, column picker and detail).
settings.fieldTruncateHint: Longer names are shown with “…”; the full name appears on hover. Exports never shorten.
settings.passwordResetDesc: Let users reset their password by email from the sign-in screen.
settings.passwordResetHint: When enabled, a “Forgot your password?” link appears on the login screen. The recovery link expires in 1 hour and can only be used once.
settings.passwordResetNoMail: Email sending is not configured (the Resend key is missing in config.php). Users will see the link but won't receive the recovery email.
settings.auditSelfViewDesc: Lets any user review their own activity log from the “My activity” menu.
settings.auditSelfViewHint: Each user sees only their own actions (never anyone else's). Administrators also have the full viewer under “Audit log”. Off by default.
settings.viewerActionsDesc: Actions that “viewer” users can run from “My forms” (admins always have them). Disabled by default.
settings.viewerAction_enketoHint: Open the public form (Enketo) to fill a new submission; deployed forms only.
settings.viewerAction_updateHint: Allow fetching new submissions of their forms. Uses the administrator account's token.
settings.viewerAction_resyncHint: Allow re-downloading all submissions (reflects edits made in Kobo). Can be slow for large forms.
settings.viewerAction_loginHint: Show the link to open the form in KoboToolbox. Requires the viewer to have a Kobo account.
settings.sharePasswordDesc: Password policy when creating read-only links. Access always uses an unguessable token in the URL; the password is an extra layer.
settings.sharePolicy_offHint: Links are accessed with the URL token only.
settings.sharePolicy_optionalHint: When creating a link you can set a password or leave it blank.
settings.sharePolicy_requiredHint: Every link must have a password.
settings.shareAttachmentsDesc: Whether attachments (photos, audio, documents) may be exposed in share links. They often contain sensitive personal data, so they can only be turned on for password-protected links.
settings.shareAttachmentsPolicy_require_passwordH: A password-protected link may expose its attachments.

shares.title: Sharing
shares.subtitle: Read-only links so anyone can browse a form's submissions, with no Kobo or KoboManager account.
shares.label: Internal name (optional)
shares.exposeAttachmentsNeedsPassword: Exposing attachments requires protecting the link with a password.
shares.passwordOptional: Optional. Blank = access via the URL token only.
shares.passwordRequired: This server requires a password on links.
shares.expiresHint: Blank = no expiry. You can always revoke it manually.
shares.empty: You haven't created any links yet.
shares.confirmRevoke: The link will stop working immediately. Continue?
shares.confirmDelete: The link and its stats will be removed. This cannot be undone.

share.loadError: This link is invalid or has expired.
share.passwordPrompt: Enter the password to view the data.

myActivity.title: My activity
myActivity.subtitle: Your own action log: what you did and when.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Record of actions (who did what and when) and system status.
audit.loadError: Could not load the audit log

about.title: About KoboToolbox
about.subtitle: What KoboToolbox is and how it connects with this application.
about.whatBody: KoboToolbox is a free platform for data collection through forms (surveys), widely used in humanitarian and research contexts. KoboManager acts as an intermediate layer: the administrator connects the Kobo accounts here and the rest of the users view, edit and validate submissions without needing a KoboToolbox account.
about.createBody: Sign up at {link} (the “Sign up” button). The username must be lowercase, with no spaces or symbols. You'll receive an activation email.
about.serversIntro: There are two independent public servers:
about.crossWarning: The two servers are independent: an account on one does not work on the other, and projects are not shared between them. Use the URL of the server where your project actually lives.
about.tokenIntro: The token is the credential this app uses to talk to Kobo on your behalf.
about.tokenUi: From the interface: your profile icon → Account Settings → Security tab → Display button next to “API Key”.
about.tokenUrl: By URL (while signed in to Kobo): https://<server>/token/?format=json
about.tokenSecurity: Treat the token like a password. In KoboManager it is stored encrypted and never shown back; if you need to change it, edit the account and enter a new one.
about.use1: The administrator adds the account (server + email + token) in “Kobo accounts”.
about.use3: Submissions are fetched into a local cache periodically; users query that cache (fast and without overloading the Kobo API).
about.use4: Editing a submission writes the change to Kobo and then updates the cache. Validation (approved/rejected) is internal to this app.
about.techNote: Technical note: KoboManager uses the KoboToolbox v2 API. The v1 API is deprecated.

submissions.title: Submissions
submissions.columnsHint: Check columns and drag to reorder. “Submitted” is always shown.
submissions.exportHint: Download the submissions (with the current filters) as CSV (UTF-8).
submissions.batchConfirm: “{action}” will be applied to {n} selected submission(s). Continue?
submissions.batchError: Could not apply the batch review

myForms.title: My forms
myForms.subtitle: Forms you have access to.
myForms.empty: You have no assigned forms yet.

detail.title: Submission detail
detail.editHint: Changes are written to KoboToolbox and then to the local cache.
detail.saveError: Could not save (is the Kobo account valid?)

errors.KOBO_TIMEOUT: Could not reach KoboToolbox. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.KOBO_UNAUTHORIZED: The Kobo account token is invalid or expired. Check it under “Kobo accounts”.
errors.KOBO_RATE_LIMIT: KoboToolbox is rate-limiting requests. Wait a moment and retry.
errors.KOBO_FORM_NOT_FOUND: The form no longer exists in KoboToolbox.
errors.KOBO_SUBMISSION_NOT_FOUND: The submission no longer exists in KoboToolbox.
errors.AUTH_RATE_LIMITED: Too many sign-in attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
errors.AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.CSRF_BLOCKED: The request was blocked for security (origin not allowed). Reload the page and try again.
errors.RESET_TOKEN_INVALID: The recovery link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Try again in a moment.
